name: e4
description: A tiny, no-fuss chess board that thinks right alongside you. You play your side, it whispers a strong move whenever you want one.
about: A tiny, no-fuss chess board that thinks right alongside you. It's your personal coach. You play your side, it whispers a strong move whenever you want one - all in your browser, no sign-ups, no nonsense.
Named after chess's most famous opening move. (Yes, the pun is on purpose.)
The 'brain' is Stockfish, one of the strongest chess engines on the planet, shrunk down to run on a web page.
features: Hints for your side, a little arrow points you toward a strong move whenever you're stuck
Follow any game, enter your opponent's moves yourself and keep getting nudges for your replies
A real engine in your pocket, Stockfish runs right inside your browser
Five difficulty levels, from "gentle nudge" to "okay, it's actually good now"
Rewind anytime, step back and forth through every move you've played
Themes & dark mode, make it feel like yours
Satisfying click-clacks, sounds for moves, captures, and checks
Phone or laptop, it just fits

name: We Track
description: A self-hosted learning platform for tracking progress across locally stored video courses.
about: We Track helps learners organize and track progress across video-based courses stored on their local machine.
The application automatically scans course folders, reads video metadata, and stores progress, notes, and tags in a local SQLite database.
Designed with privacy in mind, everything runs offline with no cloud services or accounts required.

name: Q&A Guru
description: A searchable knowledge base for programming concepts and technical interview preparation.
about: Q&A Guru is a lightweight reference tool for developers and job seekers preparing for technical interviews.
It provides a fast and searchable collection of programming questions, answers, and code examples organized by topic.
All content is stored locally in JSON files, making the application fast, simple, and available offline.
features: Collapse all answers with a single click

name: Kriva Pictures
description: A photography business website showcasing visual stories, galleries, and creative work.
about: Kriva Pictures is a professional photography website built to showcase portfolios, galleries, and visual storytelling.
The platform provides a modern and responsive browsing experience across desktop and mobile devices.
It is optimized for fast image delivery and streamlined content management using Cloudinary.
